'''âng-t-b-ch''' ('''kangatbechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:timestomp|timestomp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:timestomp|timestomp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-t-b-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kangatbechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingatbechoko|thingatbechoko]] || [[word:jingatbechoko|jingatbechoko]] || [[word:shingatbechoko|shingatbechoko]] || [[word:kingatbechoko|kingatbechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungatbechoko|thuthungatbechoko]] || [[word:jujungatbechoko|jujungatbechoko]] || [[word:shushungatbechoko|shushungatbechoko]] || [[word:kukungatbechoko|kukungatbechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatbechoko|thongatbechoko]] || [[word:jongatbechoko|jongatbechoko]] || [[word:shongatbechoko|shongatbechoko]] || [[word:kongatbechoko|kongatbechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatbechoko|thongatbechoko]] || [[word:jongatbechoko|jongatbechoko]] || [[word:shongatbechoko|shongatbechoko]] || [[word:kongatbechoko|kongatbechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
